zh.lifeSummary: 當Hezekiah Rhodes I於1660年出生在根西島時，他的父親Christopher P Rhodes26歲，母親Hannah Ann Beaumont Barbee22歲。他於1684年10月22日與Elizabeth Nichols在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州米德萊可克里斯蒂 邱奇結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1717年1月2日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州米德萊可克里斯蒂 邱奇享年57歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州米德萊可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hezekiah Rhodes I于1660年出生在根西岛时，他的父亲Christopher P Rhodes26岁，母亲Hannah Ann Beaumont Barbee22岁。他于1684年10月22日与Elizabeth Nichols在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州米德萊可克里斯蒂 邱奇结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1717年1月2日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州米德萊可克里斯蒂 邱奇享年57岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州米德萊可。

nameMeanings.name: Rhodes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: either a topographic name for someone who lived by ‘(the) woodland clearings’, plural form of Middle English rode (Old English rod, rodu), or a habitational name for someone who came from a place so named, principally Rhodes in Bury (Lancashire) or possibly from one of the many minor places in Yorkshire similarly named, or Rhodes Minnis (Kent). The Yorkshire name sometimes alternates with the singular form (see Rhode and Rode ). The Rh- spelling was introduced in the 16th and 17th centuries by clerks with a classical education, who associated the name with the Greek island of Rhodes, famous in ancient history and mythology. There is also no connection with modern English road (Old English rād ‘riding’), which was not used to denote a thoroughfare until the 16th century. The surname is particularly common in Yorkshire and Lancashire but occurs with various spellings in smaller numbers widely across England.
variant of Rhode , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Rhodus
meanings: Perhaps an altered form of Rhodes or German Rhodius, a Latinized form of Rode , perhaps indicating the personal as opposed to the topographic name (see Rode 1).

variants.name: Rod
meanings: German: habitational name from any of several places called Rod, or a topographic name for somene who lived in a woodland clearing, from a derivative of Middle High German roden ‘to clear land for cultivation’. Compare Rhodes .
Norwegian (Rød): habitational name from any of numerous farmsteads so named, from Old Norse ruth ‘clearing’.
Czech and Croatian: from a short form of the Slavic compound personal names based on the element rod ‘family, relatives’, e.g. Rodoslav.

variants.name: Roades
meanings: English: variant of   Rhodes  . This form of the surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Rhode
meanings: English: topographic name from Middle English rode (Old English rod, rodu) designating someone who lived by a woodland clearing, or for someone who came from a place so named, such as Road (Somerset), Rhode (Somerset), Road Farm in Colebrook (Devon), Rhode in Halberton (Devon), Roade (Northamptonshire), Rode (Cheshire), and Rodd (Herefordshire).
English: topographic name for someone who lived by a reed bed, from Middle English rode (Old English hrēod). See also Rude and Trude .
German: habitational name from any places called Rhode (Lower Saxony, Rhineland) and Rhoden (Hesse, Saxony-Anhalt, former Silesia).

nameMeanings.name: Hezekiah
meanings: Hebrew: The Scriptural name in Hebrew Hhizkeyyah, from hhezek-Yah, the strength of Jehovah

en.lifeSummary: When Hezekiah Rhodes I was born in 1660, in Guernsey, his father, Christopher P Rhodes, was 26 and his mother, Hannah Ann Beaumont Barbee, was 22. He married Elizabeth Nichols on 22 October 1684, in Christ Church, Middlesex, Virginia, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 2 January 1717, in Christ Church, Middlesex, Virginia, British Colonial America, at the age of 57, and was buried in Middlesex, Virginia, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hezekiah Rhodes I est né en 1660, à Guernesey, son père, Christopher P Rhodes, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Hannah Ann Beaumont Barbee, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Nichols le 22 octobre 1684, à Christ Church, Middlesex, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 2 janvier 1717, à Christ Church, Middlesex, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 57 ans, et a été enterré à Middlesex, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hezekiah Rhodes I 1660 in Guernsey geboren wurde, war sein Vater Christopher P Rhodes 26 und seine Mutter Hannah Ann Beaumont Barbee 22. Er hat am 22. Oktober 1684 in Christ Church, Middlesex, Virginia, British Colonial America Elizabeth Nichols geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 2. Januar 1717 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Christ Church, Middlesex, Virginia, British Colonial America und wurde in Middlesex, Virginia, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hezekiah Rhodes I è nato il nel 1660 nel Guernsey, il suo padre, Christopher P Rhodes, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Hannah Ann Beaumont Barbee, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Nichols il 22 ottobre 1684, nel Christ Church, Middlesex, Virginia, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 2 gennaio 1717, nel Christ Church, Middlesex, Virginia, British Colonial America, all'età di 57 anni, e fu sepolto a Middlesex, Virginia, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Hezekiah Rhodes Iが1660年にガーンジーで生まれた時，父Christopher P Rhodesは26歳，母Hannah Ann Beaumont Barbeeは22歳であった。1684年10月22日にイギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州ミッドレセックスチリスト チャーチでElizabeth Nicholsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1717年1月2日にイギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州ミッドレセックスチリスト チャーチで57歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州ミッドレセックスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Hezekiah Rhodes I(이)가 1660년 건지에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Christopher P Rhodes(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Hannah Ann Beaumont Barbee(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1684년 10월 22일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 미들레세스 크리스트 처르치에서 Elizabeth Nichols(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1717년 1월 2일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 미들레세스 크리스트 처르치에서 57세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 미들레세스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hezekiah Rhodes I nasceu em 1660, em Guernsey, seu pai, Christopher P Rhodes, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Hannah Ann Beaumont Barbee, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Nichols em 22 de outubro de 1684, em Christ Church, Middlesex, Virginia, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 2 de janeiro de 1717, em Christ Church, Middlesex, Virginia, British Colonial America, com 57 anos, e foi sepultado em Middlesex, Virginia, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hezekiah Rhodes I родился в 1660 г. в местности Гернси, его отцу по имени Christopher P Rhodes было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Hannah Ann Beaumont Barbee, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Nichols 22 октября 1684 г. в местности краист чурч, миддлесекс, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Он умер 2 января 1717 г. в местности краист чурч, миддлесекс, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 57 лет и был похоронен в местности миддлесекс, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hezekiah Rhodes I nació en 1660, en Guernsey, su papá, Christopher P Rhodes, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Hannah Ann Beaumont Barbee, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Nichols el 22 de octubre de 1684, en Christ Church, Middlesex, Virginia, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 2 de enero de 1717, en Christ Church, Middlesex, Virginia, British Colonial America, a la edad de 57 años, y fue sepultado en Middlesex, Virginia, British Colonial America.
